TEXT.source: NTU Corpus stories for Kavalan, story: KavNr-pear_syulan
TEXT.citation: Sung, L. M., Lily, I., Hsieh, F., & Lin, Z. (2008). Developing an online corpus of Formosan languages. Taiwan Journal of Linguistics, 6(2.).
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @article{sung2008developing,title={Developing an online corpus of Formosan languages.},author={Sung, Li-May and Lily, I and Hsieh, Fuhui and Lin, Zhemin and others},journal={Taiwan Journal of Linguistics},volume={6},number={2},year={2008}}

S.FORM: yau yau kenanem lazat matiw qimudu tanaungan nani.
S.PHON: jau jau kənanəm raz~rat matiw qimuɮu tanauŋan nani.
S.FORM: yau yau kenanem lazat matiw qimudu tanaungan nani.
S.PHON: jau jau kənanəm raz~rat matiw qimuɮu tanauŋan nani.
S.TRANSL: 有一個人去山上採橘子.
There is a person who went to pick oranges in the mountain.

S.FORM: yau kenanem z mala ya e mkawit tu sizi mlaziw nani.
S.PHON: jau kənanəm z~r mara ja ə mkawit tu siz~ri mraz~riw nani.
S.FORM: yau kenanem z mala ya e mkawit tu sizi mlaziw nani.
S.PHON: jau kənanəm z~r mara ja ə mkawit tu siz~ri mraz~riw nani.
S.TRANSL: 有一個人牽著羊經過.
There is a person who pulled a goat and passed by.

S.FORM: antangi yaupama kenanem sunis qazitinsya mlaziw nani.
S.PHON: antaŋi jaupama kənanəm sunis qaz~ritinsja mraz~riw nani.
S.FORM: antangi yaupama kenanem sunis qazitinsya mlaziw nani.
S.PHON: antaŋi jaupama kənanəm sunis qaz~ritinsja mraz~riw nani.
S.TRANSL: 還有一個小孩騎腳踏車經過.
There is still another child who rode a bike and passed by.

S.FORM: titaanna yau mulu ta qanasan nani.
S.PHON: titaanna jau muru ta qanasan nani.
S.FORM: titaanna yau mulu ta qanasan nani.
S.PHON: titaanna jau muru ta qanasan nani.
S.TRANSL: 他看到籃子裡有橘子.
He saw that there were oranges in the basket.

S.FORM: puniR uzusa qanas nani.
S.PHON: puniʁ uz~rusa qanas nani.
S.FORM: puniR uzusa qanas nani.
S.PHON: puniʁ uz~rusa qanas nani.
S.TRANSL: 兩個籃子是滿的.
The two baskets were full.

S.FORM: alaannati sunis 'nay mala tu izau pizianna ta kitinsyaan.
S.PHON: araannati sunis ʔnaj mara tu iz~rau piz~rianna ta kitinsjaan.
S.FORM: alaannati sunis 'nay mala tu izau pizianna ta kitinsyaan.
S.PHON: araannati sunis ʔnaj mara tu iz~rau piz~rianna ta kitinsjaan.

TRANSL.notes: 小孩拿了(橘子)放在腳踏車上.

S.TRANSL: 小孩拿了 放在腳踏車上.

TRANSL.notes: The child took (oranges) and put (them) onto the bike.

S.TRANSL: The child took and put onto the bike.

S.FORM: mala sunis 'nay tmanan timngu talazanan siqatazai tu tazungan sunis nani mzuqudti tu betu msuRawti.
S.PHON: mara sunis ʔnaj tmanan timŋu taraz~ranan siqataz~rai tu taz~ruŋan sunis nani mz~ruquɮti tu βətu msuʁawti.
S.FORM: mala sunis 'nay tmanan timngu talazanan siqatazai tu tazungan sunis nani mzuqudti tu betu msuRawti.
S.PHON: mara sunis ʔnaj tmanan timŋu taraz~ranan siqataz~rai tu taz~ruŋan sunis nani mz~ruquɮti tu βətu msuʁawti.
S.TRANSL: 撞到石頭跌倒了.
stumbled over a stone.

S.FORM: nizti tmibuq 'nay muluna ta lazanan nani.
S.PHON: niz~rti tmiβuq ʔnaj muruna ta raz~ranan nani.
S.FORM: nizti tmibuq 'nay muluna ta lazanan nani.
S.PHON: niz~rti tmiβuq ʔnaj muruna ta raz~ranan nani.
S.TRANSL: 他所有的橘子都掉到路上了.
All his oranges fell onto the road.

S.FORM: yau kintulu sunis Runanay mlaziw.
S.PHON: jau kinturu sunis ʁunanaj mraz~riw.
S.FORM: yau kintulu sunis Runanay mlaziw.
S.PHON: jau kinturu sunis ʁunanaj mraz~riw.
S.TRANSL: 有三個男孩經過.
There are three boys who passed by.

S.FORM: pangmuannati kmyala pizianna ta qanasan.
S.PHON: paŋmuannati kmjara piz~rianna ta qanasan.
S.FORM: pangmuannati kmyala pizianna ta qanasan.
S.PHON: paŋmuannati kmjara piz~rianna ta qanasan.

TRANSL.notes: 他們幫忙撿(橘子),放到籃子裡.

S.TRANSL: 他們幫忙撿 ,放到籃子裡.

TRANSL.notes: They helped to pick up (the oranges) and put (them) into the basket.

S.TRANSL: They helped to pick up and put into the basket.

S.FORM: pangmuanna kmyala taqanasan nani.
S.PHON: paŋmuanna kmjara taqanasan nani.
S.FORM: pangmuanna kmyala taqanasan nani.
S.PHON: paŋmuanna kmjara taqanasan nani.

TRANSL.notes: 他們幫忙撿(橘子),放到籃子裡.

S.TRANSL: 他們幫忙撿 ,放到籃子裡.

TRANSL.notes: They helped to pick up (the oranges) and put (them) into the basket.

S.TRANSL: They helped to pick up and put into the basket.

S.FORM: kalinguannati qubuna nani.
S.PHON: kariŋuannati quβuna nani.
S.FORM: kalinguannati qubuna nani.
S.PHON: kariŋuannati quβuna nani.
S.TRANSL: 他忘了他的帽子.
He forgot his hat.

S.FORM: wiyati sunis 'nay smaqay nani.
S.PHON: wijati sunis ʔnaj smaqaj nani.
S.FORM: wiyati sunis 'nay smaqay nani.
S.PHON: wijati sunis ʔnaj smaqaj nani.
S.TRANSL: 小孩走開了.
The child walked away.

S.FORM: timngu titaanna kintulu 'nay sunis 'nay qubuna nani.
S.PHON: timŋu titaanna kinturu ʔnaj sunis ʔnaj quβuna nani.
S.FORM: timngu titaanna kintulu 'nay sunis 'nay qubuna nani.
S.PHON: timŋu titaanna kinturu ʔnaj sunis ʔnaj quβuna nani.
S.TRANSL: 那三個小孩看到他的帽子.
The three children saw his hat.

S.FORM: qasana muman bula tu qubuna nani bulaannati sunis 'nay tu utulu mulu.
S.PHON: qasana muman βura tu quβuna nani βuraannati sunis ʔnaj tu uturu muru.
S.FORM: qasana muman bula tu qubuna nani bulaannati sunis 'nay tu utulu mulu.
S.PHON: qasana muman βura tu quβuna nani βuraannati sunis ʔnaj tu uturu muru.
S.TRANSL: 小孩給他們三顆橘子.
The child gave them three oranges.

S.FORM: saqanannumi zinna nani.
S.PHON: saqanannumi z~rinna nani.
S.FORM: saqanannumi zinna nani.
S.PHON: saqanannumi z~rinna nani.
S.TRANSL: '給你們吃的,' 他這樣說.
'For you to eat,' said he.

S.FORM: wiyati kintulu sunis 'nay.
S.PHON: wijati kinturu sunis ʔnaj.
S.FORM: wiyati kintulu sunis 'nay.
S.PHON: wijati kinturu sunis ʔnaj.
S.TRANSL: 那三個小孩離開了.
The three children left.

S.FORM: mlaziw qaya tu e qimuluay 'nay lazat 'nay nani.
S.PHON: mraz~riw qaja tu ə qimuruaj ʔnaj raz~rat ʔnaj nani.
S.FORM: mlaziw qaya tu e qimuluay 'nay lazat 'nay nani.
S.PHON: mraz~riw qaja tu ə qimuruaj ʔnaj raz~rat ʔnaj nani.
S.TRANSL: 經過採橘子的那個人.

TRANSL.notes: (They) passed the person who was picking oranges.

S.TRANSL: passed the person who was picking oranges.

S.FORM: sunis 'nay qimuluay lazat nani titaannaimu ni maiti usiq qanas 'nay mulu.
S.PHON: sunis ʔnaj qimuruaj raz~rat nani titaannaimu ni maiti usiq qanas ʔnaj muru.
S.FORM: sunis 'nay qimuluay lazat nani titaannaimu ni maiti usiq qanas 'nay mulu.
S.PHON: sunis ʔnaj qimuruaj raz~rat nani titaannaimu ni maiti usiq qanas ʔnaj muru.
S.TRANSL: 他看到他們. 一籃橘子不見了.
He saw them. One basket of oranges was gone.

S.FORM: titaanna kinaw kintulu sisi yau qman tu mulu tu nibulaanna tu qaqananna qaniyau nani.
S.PHON: titaanna kinaw kinturu sisi jau qman tu muru tu niβuraanna tu qaqananna qanijau nani.
S.FORM: titaanna kinaw kintulu sisi yau qman tu mulu tu nibulaanna tu qaqananna qaniyau nani.
S.PHON: titaanna kinaw kinturu sisi jau qman tu muru tu niβuraanna tu qaqananna qanijau nani.

TRANSL.notes: 他看到三個(小孩)在吃橘子,小孩給他們的,要給他們吃的.

S.TRANSL: 他看到三個 在吃橘子,小孩給他們的,要給他們吃的.

TRANSL.notes: He saw the three (children) eating oranges, which were given by the child and were for them to eat.

S.TRANSL: He saw the three eating oranges, which were given by the child and were for them to eat.

S.FORM: mana maiti mana maiti mulu 'nay usiq qanas zinna.
S.PHON: mana maiti mana maiti muru ʔnaj usiq qanas z~rinna.
S.FORM: mana maiti mana maiti mulu 'nay usiq qanas zinna.
S.PHON: mana maiti mana maiti muru ʔnaj usiq qanas z~rinna.
S.TRANSL: '為什麼一籃橘子不見了?' 他這樣說.
'Why is one basket of oranges gone?' said he.
